question: How many days passed between the day I repotted the previous spider plant and the day I gave my neighbor, Mrs. Johnson, a few cuttings from my spider plant?
ground_truth_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
The user gave Mrs. Johnson cuttings from their spider plant
The user plans to give Mrs. Johnson a bag of organic potting mix formulated for indoor plants
The user plans to give Mrs. Johnson a small ceramic planter with a cute design
